subtopics: Stack $\cdot$ Hash Set $\cdot$ Trie $\cdot$ LRU/LFU Cache $\cdot$ Iterator $\cdot$ Median Heaps $\cdot$ All-O(1) DS

sections.title: Augmented Stack and O(1) Random Access

blocks.content: **Min Stack.** Design a stack supporting \texttt{push}, \texttt{pop}, \texttt{top}, and \texttt{getMin} — all in $O(1)$.
**Insert Delete GetRandom O(1).** Design a set supporting \texttt{insert}, \texttt{remove}, and \texttt{getRandom} (uniform) — all average $O(1)$.
**Implement Trie (Prefix Tree).** Implement \texttt{insert}, \texttt{search} (exact match), and \texttt{startsWith} (prefix check).
**LRU Cache.** Design a cache with capacity $k$ supporting $O(1)$ \texttt{get} and \texttt{put}. When full, evict the *least recently used* entry.
**Flatten Nested List Iterator.** Given a nested list of integers (each element is an integer or a list of integers), implement an iterator that flattens it.
**Find Median from Data Stream.** Support \texttt{addNum} and \texttt{findMedian}. \texttt{addNum}: $O(\log n)$; \texttt{findMedian}: $O(1)$.
**LFU Cache.** Design a cache with capacity $k$ supporting $O(1)$ \texttt{get} and \texttt{put}. Evict the *least frequently used* entry (break ties by LRU within the same frequency).
**All O(1) Data Structure.** Design a data structure supporting: \texttt{inc(key)}, \texttt{dec(key)}, \texttt{getMaxKey()}, \texttt{getMinKey()} — all in $O(1)$.
